basic_details.job_title: CGPSC Assistant Librarian Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Chhattisgarh Public Service Commission (CGPSC) has published the Assistant Librarian Notification 2026 on 21 April 2026. The recruitment drive aims to fill 7 Assistant Librarian positions. Candidates within the age range of 21 to 40 years (age relaxation applicable) and holding a Bachelor’s degree in Library Science or Library and Information Science are eligible to apply online at the official website. The application process will be active from 24 April 2026 to 23 May 2026, and candidates can easily access the notification PDF and apply link below.

age_limit.age_details: Min: 21 years, Max: 40 years (with relaxation for Chhattisgarh residents)
age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 21 years Maximum Age: 40 years (for Chhattisgarh residents) Age relaxation is applicable as per government rules: SC/ST/OBC (Non-Creamy Layer): 5 years Local Female Candidates of Chhattisgarh: 10 years Permanent/Temporary Employees of Chhattisgarh Govt.: 5 years Combined Maximum Age Limit: 45 years

qualification.education_qualification: Bachelor's degree in Library Science or Library and Information Science
qualification.details: Bachelor's degree in Library Science or Library and Information Science from a recognized university.

salary_details.details: Pay Matrix Level 10 (Rs. 43200-136500) Dearness Allowance and other allowances as per state government rules.

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the CGPSC Assistant Librarian Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 23-05-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of CGPSC to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the CGPSC Assistant Librarian recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application form for the CGPSC Assistant Librarian recruitment is 23 May 2026. Candidates are advised to apply well before the deadline to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Assistant Librarian post?
faq.answer: The minimum educational qualification required for the Assistant Librarian post is a Bachelor's degree in Library Science or Library and Information Science from a recognized university.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for applying to the Assistant Librarian position?
faq.answer: The age limit for the Assistant Librarian post is a minimum of 21 years and a maximum of 40 years. Age relaxation is applicable for certain categories as per government norms.

faq.question: Q4. How many vacancies are available for the Assistant Librarian post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 7 vacancies announced for the सहायक ग्रंथपाल post by the Chhattisgarh Public Service Commission (CGPSC).

faq.question: Q5. What is the application fee for the CGPSC Assistant Librarian recruitment?
faq.answer: The application fee varies based on category. For SC/ST/OBC (Non-Creamy Layer) & PWD (Chhattisgarh Residents), it is Rs. 300, and for other categories and candidates from outside Chhattisgarh, it is Rs. 400.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary structure for the Assistant Librarian post?
faq.answer: The selected candidates for the Assistant Librarian post will receive a salary in Pay Matrix Level 10, ranging from Rs. 43,200 to Rs. 1,36,500, along with Dearness Allowance and other applicable allowances.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the CGPSC Assistant Librarian recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Assistant Librarian post includes a Preliminary Examination, followed by a Main Examination (Written), and finally a Viva-voce.

faq.question: Q8. When will the online application process start?
faq.answer: The online application process for the CGPSC Assistant Librarian recruitment will commence on 24 April 2026.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section of this article. It is recommended to download and read it thoroughly before applying.

faq.question: Q10. Is there any age relaxation for candidates from Chhattisgarh?
faq.answer: Yes, age relaxation is provided for candidates from Chhattisgarh. Specifically, local female candidates of Chhattisgarh can avail a relaxation of 10 years, and permanent/temporary employees of Chhattisgarh Govt. can get a relaxation of 5 years.

faq.question: What is the last date to apply for the CGPSC Assistant Librarian recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application form for the CGPSC Assistant Librarian recruitment is 23 May 2026. Candidates are advised to apply well before the deadline to avoid any last-minute issues.
